title: Datadog: Still A Growth Story For The Long Term
text: Datadog is a founder-led company focusing on observability and security for cloud applications. The company has a strong customer base with consumers continuing to use more and more Datadog products. title: Datadog: Alarming Mismatch Between Consensus Estimates, Management Guidance
text: Datadog's stock price has rebounded from the lows, even as the underlying business is facing persistent headwinds. The company has delivered strong financial results and sustained customer growth on account of its deep product portfolio. Management is guiding for just 15% growth exiting the year, yet consensus estimates are far more bullish.
